description_long: This object is a compact, cylindrical smoke alarm with a smooth, glossy red exterior. The top surface is slightly domed, and the sides feature a series of evenly spaced, vertical slits forming a grill pattern for air flow and smoke detection. The lower section is solid, with a small circular indicator light visible on one side. The object appears to be made primarily of plastic, with internal components likely including metal and electronic parts. Its design is modern and functional, suitable for mounting in indoor urban environments such as hallways, garages, or public buildings.
description: A glossy red cylindrical smoke alarm with vertical grill slits and a small indicator light on the lower side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the red cylindrical body, vertical grill slits, and a clear view of the top dome.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the small circular indicator light on the lower section beneath the grill slits.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with grill slits visible but no indicator light present.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the grill slits and smooth lower section without the indicator light.
attribute_indicator_light: small black circular light on the lower side
